title: alisma geyeri var. pumilum
intro: Alisma geyeri var. pumilum, also known as dwarf water plantain, is a small, aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alisma geyeri var. pumilum include reducing edema, alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
